title: phytolaccaceae
intro: The phytolaccaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the pokeweed or phytolacca family. This family comprises about 20 genera and over 100 species, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Members of the phytolaccaceae family are often characterized by their small, greenish or purple flowers and distinctive fruit, which can be either berries or capsules. The phytolaccaceae family includes plants with a range of uses, from ornamental plants to those with medicinal and edible properties.
